caption: A woman with curly hair tied in a top knot and wearing a dark green t-shirt sits in a studio setting. She is positioned behind a black desk with a professional microphone on a stand in front of her and wears black headphones. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring white text that includes "SS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", "CAST", and "About It!". A blue-toned image of hands is displayed on a screen or poster to her left, and a smaller version of the same image appears on the backdrop. Small logos with the text "BOSS TALK 101" are visible on the table and the backdrop. Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains a slight smile and looks toward someone off-screen, with minimal movement in her posture and facial expression as the scene remains static.
